use_cases: Display loading states while content is being fetched or processed
Indicate ongoing background operations in web applications
Provide visual feedback during page transitions or navigation
Show processing status during form submissions or API calls
Enhance user experience during asynchronous operations
ai_summary: An animated geometric loader featuring seven rotating squares arranged in a 45-degree tilted container, creating a mesmerizing sequential animation effect. The component includes a dark/light mode toggle with a subtle grid background pattern. Built with pure CSS animations and Tailwind classes for a clean, flat aesthetic suitable for any loading scenario.
